text:
[set out as appropriate];

Undertaking to purchase a car

The [respondent] / [applicant] will fund the purchase every [number] years of a new car of [make and model] / [of a make and model equivalent to [make and model] for the use of the [applicant] / [respondent] for the child[ren] of the family’s benefit until the youngest surviving [of the] child[ren] of the family attains the age of 18 years or ceases [his] / [her] / [their] full-time [secondary] / [tertiary] education [to first degree level]] or permanently ceases to live with the [applicant] / [respondent]. [(For avoidance of doubt, where the relevant child takes a pre-tertiary education gap year, delaying the commencement of tertiary education by one year, this shall not be construed as ceasing tertiary education.)] This car to be purchased pursuant to paragraph [para number of para on order for lump sum below], on the basis that on the purchase of the replacement vehicle the previous vehicle should be traded in and proceeds applied to the replacement.

Undertaking to maintain medical insurance cover

The [respondent] / [applicant] shall maintain the existing medical insurance cover, including paying promptly any premiums due, with [name of  company] or any successor company for the [applicant] / [respondent] [for so long as the order for periodical payments at paragraph [para number] below in respect of the child[ren] of the family shall subsist] [and] / [or] for the child[ren] of the family [until [he] / [she] / [they] shall [respectively] attain the age of 18 or cease [his] / [her] / [their] full-time secondary education] / [for so long as the order for periodical payments at paragraph [para number] below in respect of [him] / [her]/ [them] shall subsist] at [specify scale of cover (e.g. at the same level of cover currently provided)].
